item.dc:creator: X117

item.title: What Would Dolly Do?
item.description:
Hello Imgur! I operate an affiliate of The Imagination Library in Kent County, MI, and I have to say I love having Dolly as my boss. She is amazing and generous, and The Imagination Library that she built is an amazing program. It still takes me coffee to get outta bed, though.
The Imagination Library is book gifting program. We mail books every month to children under 5, free of cost to the families.
What a talented lady.
I try to adopt this attitude. I've never run a non-profit, and I have no real fundraising experience. But we have done amazing work to bring books to kids in our area.
I operate an affiliate of Dolly Parton's Imagination Library, and I have so appreciated the Imgur community's support of our program! For $30, you can support one child for a whole year which gifts them 12 books! We would really appreciate your help again this Giving Tuesday. https://www.earlybirdbooks.org/donate.html
I know the Imgur community is wonderful, kind, and incredibly thoughtful, just like Dolly. Thank you, thank you, thank you to those here on Imgur who have supported me in the past! To date, you have helped us mail over 44,200 books! The books from Dolly Parton's Imagination Library are mailed for free to children and families enrolled in the program. While Dolly covers a lot of overhead to make these books affordable and accessible, the wholesale cost of the books are still paid for by the local affiliates like mine. Please consider supporting your own local Imagination Library affiliate with a donation. For $30, you can support one child for a whole year which gifts them 12 books! You can find your local affiliates here: https://imaginationlibrary.com/usa/find-my-program/ The books are wonderfully diverse, high quality, and age appropriate. For families with young children, you can see if the program is available in your area here: https://imaginationlibrary.com/check-availability/ I currently operate an affiliate in Kent County, MI, and we are trying to expand our coverage to include the entire county. Read more about our efforts in Kent County, MI here: https://earlybirdbooks.org/ Every day, ask yourself, "What would Dolly do?" Stay weird, Imgur.
item.dc:creator: Drosera

Once you see it you can’t unsee it. Take your time.

NIИ tax #nine_inch_nails_tax
item.dc:creator: SisterMidnight

item.title: What Is This Feeling?
item.description:
In May I had a huge ass tumor removed from my frontal lobe.
Look at that bastard. My surgeon said I might experience an uptick in general quality of life, since it had been skooshing my brain to the side and invading my frontal lobe pretty drastically. I didn't really get excited because it was only a 'might' and I was more focused on, you know, surviving. I didn't realize it at first, but after recovery I found myself able to do tasks without it feeling like having to tear off my own limbs to get it done. Instead of staring at a messy kitchen, I'd just...clean it. If I had to shower and fold laundry I'd shower and fold laundry without even really thinking about it, instead of internally screaming at myself over and over to just get it done. I have ADHD, always have, and this was an entirely new feeling. I cannot express how fabulous it's been. It's like I'd been wearing iron shoes my whole life and suddenly they were off. As a side note - if you're a lady who's been on Depo Provera for more than two months, there's increasing evidence that the shot can cause tumors. There are lots of lawsuits currently about it (I've got a lawyer for it myself), but no class actions yet. Please, if you were on it, get a scan if you can. It was pure luck my doc ordered one because I had chronic nausea, and BOOM there it was.
item.dc:creator: hahway

item.title: Men need to police each other more. Call out the bad behavior when you see it.
item.description: I’m tired of walking on eggshells around men here. If you’re NOT a piece of shit guy, you’re not gonna be offended. You’re gonna want to help women to feel safe. Please do better. Be a safe man. Raise your boys to treat girls and women with respect.
item.dc:creator: roaduardo

item.title: A family of Xolos, one of the most ancient dog breeds in the world, originally from what is now Mexico. Native Americans, they were guardians of the night and the underworld, protectors against evil spirits, and guides of mortals during difficult times.

item.title: Transgirl Tuesday part U
item.description:
Oncloud_e
Akira Wyatt
The Trans Fairy
Hannah Winterbourne
Hunter
Stef Sanjati
Sarah Ashton-Cirillo: if you don’t know who she is, you really should look her up. Badass to the core
@Alsoashley This is my 21st volume (part U for those who like the alphabetical count…you weirdos) of Transgirl Tuesday. This edition is Armed Women. Given the shit the world is turning into, I wanted to show that even without support you are ferocious and no one can stop you. All the best friends @MadSovereignMary @dickblack12 @Shenaniganz80 @MermaidNinja @secretlyacd @deaddogsmuggler

greetings online friends
imgur emerald works on my phone after an update
looks good to me
perfection
dang
unreal
i guess
yes
mmm hmm
i'm listening
husbands always be becoming grain
i did not crop this
those damn cables
every time
it's always the wrong week to quit glue
ok
who knew?
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Do good dump
item.description:
Like the 40 hours. Like what happened humanity? How’d we fuck this up so bad?
Yep
Capitalism and business. There’s a profit to be turned in all things. Even in death and decay.
This is the kind of pun that I like best.
The telltale project
No notes
May it last 333 1/3rd years!!!
It is wholly unethical to hoard bread for any reason other than to feed a lot of people in the next day or two.
Buttholes… the lot of them!!!
lol
Yeah!!! Wait… is this a state of fact? Or an insult?
Only one bus allowed
Though this is a different story overseas. Both problems could be solved if the US respected their funds from their military to healthcare, but…
Yeah not down with that at all.
I can’t think of a purpose more noble.
This makes me hot
Noted.
I woke up after surgery with my hand in a mitten tied to the side of the bed. Like I wasn’t good enough to have fingered gloves.
Tragedy in three acts
Not just colonialism but war and oppression in general. The level of human cruelty has always been the same, I think. It’s just the delivery of the damage and the news is spread that much faster.
I want to be that kind, I want that kind of kindness upon me. The world can use a lot more of kindness I think. Empathy is what helps us progress forward together as a species. We lose sight of that at times.
Always be true and have no time for anyone who won’t let you be your genuine self
All the good that every one of us can do. I see you out there helping others, giving pizza and what not. It gives me hope.
Some days you’re the one despairing, other days, you’re the sandwich ignored on the floor.
I think everyone knows this to be true on some level. They just don’t want to speak out just in case they get rich.
I love this. Romans with their butterfingers…
From this day on.
Have sex with her again and he’ll be gone.
It has for me since my teens though.
“Uppies!”
Need all that soggy trauma off me.
Cat tax: Mona. Also, there’s an organization called the “Splinter Collective” out in Tucson AZ that does a lot of good work for marginalized people and communities. Check out their website here: https://splintercollective.org/. And their YouTube page: https://m.youtube.com/@SplinterCollective. Be well everyone
I love it when you talk nerdy to me.
Now that we’ve entered December, I think a counterattack from Thanksgiving is in order. Maybe NNN?
Retirement has me on a limited income. We have to reuse the depends.
Are you mad at me?
I’m waiting…?!?!
Let’s get this straight people.
But those turtles were NINJA!!!
This makes me hot. And hurt. At the same time.
Yeah!!!
I want it and I want it NOW!!!
Furreals
Me play joke. Be put peepee in your coke.
It totally is. So is believing in the lot of them.
The Baggins side speaks louder to me. Especially the older I get.
“Call me Janet.”
I’m tired of waiting.
Random dickbutt in the wild!
Despite them? It’s a feature, not a bug.
item.dc:creator: grapekoolaid

item.title: Happy Birthday to Brendan Fraser, born 3rd December 1968
item.description:
He won the Best Actor Academy Award in 2022 for his role in The Whale
Fraser's starring role as an obese gay man in The Whale earned him critical acclaim and numerous accolades, including the Academy Award for Best Actor, the first Canadian to do so
Encino Man (1992), or as it was known here in the UK - California Man
The film that made us all go weak at the knees - The Mummy (1999)
And the reason this post is marked mature - George of the Jungle (1997)
item.dc:creator: Nuraalek

item.title: Four lifelong friends
item.description:
Four lifelong friends replicated this (summer of 1972) favorite vacation photo in Torquay, Devon, over 50 years later. Courtesy Sue Morris.
Here's the recreated photo, taken in October 2024. Pictured from left to right: Marion Bamforth, Sue Morris, Carol Ansbro and Mary Helliwell in Torquay, Devon in the UK. Courtesy Jane Brook and Carole Connell,
item.dc:creator: NGC300

item.dc:creator: Wordsocinesc

item.title: 11 years since I was diagnosed
item.description: Diagnosed at 19 with ADHD-PI, tried non-stimulants, then non-amphetamine stimulants, then finally Vyvanse which worked great but had it's own drawbacks (mainly crashes and a feeling of anxiety when the meds started wearing off.) A few months ago I posted about starting another med, Qelbree, which was quite a roller-coaster in the first months but really worked wonders at cutting my anxiety and depression related to my ADHD. The biggest downside was that it also made me a zombie, all I wanted to do was nap. I mentioned this to my Dr. and we decided to try instant release Focalin, and holy shit you guys. It's what has been missing all these years, I don't feel speedy and manic like I did on Vyvanse, I just feel awake, alert, and like my self. Just wanted to share, if anyone out there is struggling with ADHD, just know you are NOT lazy, you are NOT unmotivated, you are NOT a loser; you are an individual with a genuine medical condition and deserve to be treated as such.
item.dc:creator: nomorehate

item.title: Returning stolen goods pt 110
item.description:
I made this actually, cause of an idiot argument on idiot FB with some idiot and they said they didn't like Bounty Bars. Idiot.
I'm an 84 and Jeepers Creepers scared the shit outta me. I was 18(?) and I had to sleep with the lights on for two weeks. "DARRYYYY!!!!!" Ugh.
Mooboob.
Oh look, it's me! MOO BOOB!
Okay I stumbled across this pic on fb, some woman talking about this being a game or whatever and she didnt know what it was called and it unlocked a core memory. I AM SURE I've seen these, either at my grandparents' or I had them. Anyone know what these are??
